/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--gc-sections -s -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/void_game.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/void_game.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/void_game.dir/src/vmath.cpp.o CMakeFiles/void_game.dir/src/platform.cpp.o CMakeFiles/void_game.dir/src/renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/void_game.dir/src/audio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/void_game.dir/src/world.cpp.o CMakeFiles/void_game.dir/src/entity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/void_game.dir/src/game.cpp.o -o void_game  /usr/lib64/libX11.so /usr/lib64/libXext.so -lm -ldl -lpthread /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so
